title: Insecure Data Input Handling
description: The system likely processes user input without proper validation and sanitization. This could allow attackers to inject malicious code (e.g., SQL injection, XSS) or manipulate data, leading to data corruption, unauthorized access, or system compromise.
affected_component: All backend services processing user input
attack_vector: Injection attacks (SQLi, XSS, command injection) via vulnerable input fields.
mitigations: Implement robust input validation and sanitization at all stages of data processing.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious requests.
